sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ الْكَرَمُ عِنْدَ الْعَرَبِ مُجَرَّدَ فِعْلٍ عَابِرٍ لِلْجُودِ الْمَادِّيِّ، بَلْ تَحَوَّلَ عَبْرَ الْعُصُورِ إِلَى فَلْسَفَةٍ وُجُودِيَّةٍ عَمِيقَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo kod Arapa nije bilo samo prolazan čin materijalne velikodušnosti, već se kroz vjekove transformisalo u duboku egzistencijalnu filozofiju.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality among the Arabs was not merely a transient act of material generosity; rather, it transformed over the ages into a profound existential philosophy.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهُ مِيثَاقٌ أَخْلَاقِيٌّ غَيْرُ مَكْتُوبٍ يَرْبِطُ أَبْنَاءَ الصَّحْرَاءِ بِرِبَاطِ الشَّرَفِ.
sentences.translation: To je nepisani etički kodeks koji povezuje sinove pustinje sponom časti.
sentences.translationEn: It is an unwritten ethical covenant that binds the sons of the desert with a bond of honor.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَمِدُّ هَذَا الْمِيثَاقُ جُذُورَهُ مِنْ قَسَاوَةِ الْبَادِيَةِ وَرَحَابَةِ النَّفْسِ الْبَشَرِيَّةِ الْمِعْطَاءَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj kodeks crpi svoje korijene iz surovosti pustinje i prostranstva darovite ljudske duše.
sentences.translationEn: This covenant derives its roots from the harshness of the wilderness and the expansiveness of the giving human soul.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ تَقْلِيدُ "إِيقَادِ النَّارِ" لَيْلًا وَسِيلَةً نَبِيلَةً لِإِرْشَادِ التَّائِهِينَ فِي الْفَلَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Tradicija 'paljenja vatre' noću bila je plemenit način usmjeravanja onih koji su se izgubili u divljini.
sentences.translationEn: The tradition of 'lighting the fire' at night was a noble means of guiding those lost in the wasteland.

sentences.arabic: فَفَيَافِي الصَّحْرَاءِ الشَّاسِعَةِ كَانَتْ تَحْتَاجُ دَوْمًا إِلَى مِثْلِ هَذِهِ الْأَنْوَارِ الْبَاشَّةِ لِطَمْأَنَةِ الْقُلُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Prostranim pustinjskim bespućima uvijek su bila potrebna takva vedra svjetla kako bi umirila srca.
sentences.translationEn: The vast desert expanses always needed such cheerful lights to reassure hearts.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنْ ذَلِكَ إِلَّا تَجَسِيدًا صَادِقًا لِلْمَسْؤُولِيَّةِ الْجَمَاعِيَّةِ الْكُبْرَى تِجَاهَ الْغَرِيبِ.
sentences.translation: To nije bilo ništa drugo do iskreno oličenje velike kolektivne odgovornosti prema strancu.
sentences.translationEn: This was nothing but a sincere embodiment of the great collective responsibility toward the stranger.

sentences.arabic: يُنْظَرُ إِلَى "ابْنِ السَّبِيلِ" دَائِمًا كَأَمَانَةٍ إِلَهِيَّةٍ مُقَدَّسَةٍ تَحِلُّ بِالدِّيَارِ.
sentences.translation: Na 'putnika namjernika' se uvijek gleda kao na sveti Božiji amanet koji pristiže u domove.
sentences.translationEn: The 'wayfarer' is always viewed as a sacred divine trust arriving at one's abode.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَوْجِبُ هَذِهِ الْأَمَانَةُ بَذْلَ الْغَالِي وَالنَّفِيسِ لِضَمَانِ رَاحَةِ الضَّيْفِ وَكَرَامَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Taj amanet zahtijeva žrtvovanje onoga najdragocjenijeg kako bi se osigurala udobnost i dostojanstvo gosta.
sentences.translationEn: This trust necessitates sacrificing what is precious and dear to ensure the guest's comfort and dignity.

sentences.arabic: خَلَّدَ الشُّعَرَاءُ الْجَاهِلِيُّونَ هَذِهِ الْقِيمَةَ الْعُلْيَا فِي مُعَلَّقَاتِهِمُ الَّتِي تَنْضَحُ بِالْفَخْرِ.
sentences.translation: Predislamski pjesnici ovjekovječili su ovu vrhunsku vrijednost u svojim muallakama koje odišu ponosom.
sentences.translationEn: Pre-Islamic poets immortalized this supreme value in their Mu'allaqat, which overflow with pride.

sentences.arabic: حَاتِمٌ الطَّائِيُّ كَانَ وَلَا يَزَالُ الرَّمْزَ الْأَسْمَى لِهَذَا السُّخَاءِ الْعَرَبِيِّ الْأُسْطُورِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Hatim al-Tai je bio i ostao najuzvišeniji simbol ove legendarne arapske darežljivosti.
sentences.translationEn: Hatim al-Tai was and remains the ultimate symbol of this legendary Arabic generosity.

sentences.arabic: اِعْتَبَرَ هَؤُلَاءِ الشُّعَرَاءُ أَنَّ إِطْعَامَ الضَّيْفِ هُوَ اِنْتِصَارٌ لِلْإِنْسَانِيَّةِ الْحَقَّةِ عَلَى الْأَنَانِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi pjesnici su smatrali da je hranjenje gosta pobjeda istinske humanosti nad sebičnošću.
sentences.translationEn: These poets considered feeding a guest a victory for true humanity over selfishness.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ صِرَاعٌ مَحْمُومٌ ضِدَّ شُحِّ الطَّبِيعَةِ وَتَقَلُّبَاتِ الزَّمَانِ الْغَادِرِ.
sentences.translation: To je grozničava borba protiv škrtosti prirode i prevrtljivosti sudbine.
sentences.translationEn: It is a feverish struggle against the stinginess of nature and the fluctuations of treacherous time.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَنْحَصِرُ الْكَرَمُ فِي تَقْدِيمِ الطَّعَامِ وَالشَّرَابِ لِلْجَائِعِ فَحَسْبُ.
sentences.translation: Velikodušnost nije ograničena samo na posluživanje hrane i pića gladnome.
sentences.translationEn: Generosity is not confined to merely providing food and drink to the hungry.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ يَتَعَدَّاهُ إِلَى بَشَاشَةِ الْوَجْهِ وَحُسْنِ الِاسْتِقْبَالِ وَطِيبِ الْمَعْشَرِ.
sentences.translation: Ona se proteže i na vedrinu lica, srdačan doček i prijatno druženje.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it extends to the radiance of the face, a warm reception, and pleasant company.

sentences.arabic: يُقَالُ فِي الْمَأْثُورِ الْعَرَبِيِّ الْقَدِيمِ: "الْبَشَاشَةُ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْقِرَى"، تَأْكِيدًا عَلَى رُوحِ الْوُدِّ.
sentences.translation: U starom arapskom predanju kaže se: 'Vedrina je bolja od gozbe', naglašavajući duh ljubaznosti.
sentences.translationEn: It is said in ancient Arabic lore: 'A cheerful countenance is better than the feast,' emphasizing the spirit of friendliness.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّرَاثُ الْقِيَمِيُّ الْعَرِيقُ يُشَكِّلُ حَتَّى الْيَوْمِ النَّوَاةَ الصَّلْبَةَ لِلْهُوِيَّةِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo drevno vrijednosno naslijeđe i danas čini čvrsto jezgro društvenog identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: This ancient value heritage constitutes, to this day, the solid core of social identity.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَزِجُ فِيهِ الشَّهَامَةُ الْفِطْرِيَّةُ بِالتَّوَاضُعِ الْجَمِّ الَّذِي يَأْسِرُ الْقُلُوبَ.
sentences.translation: U njemu se urođena plemenitost miješa sa golemom skromnošću koja plijeni srca.
sentences.translationEn: In it, innate gallantry blends with a profound humility that captivates hearts.

sentences.arabic: يَبْقَى بَيْتُ الْمُضِيفِ مَلَاذًا آمِنًا لِكُلِّ طَارِقٍ يَبْحَثُ عَنِ السَّكِينَةِ وَالْأَمَانِ.
sentences.translation: Domaćinov dom ostaje sigurno utočište za svakog namjernika koji traži spokoj i sigurnost.
sentences.translationEn: The host's home remains a safe haven for every knocker seeking tranquility and safety.

sentences.arabic: الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ بِرَائِحَتِهَا الزَّكِيَّةِ تَظَلُّ الشَّاهِدَ الْأَوَّلَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْحَفَاوَةِ الَّتِي لَا تَنْطَفِئُ نِيرَانُهَا.
sentences.translation: Arapska kafa sa svojim miomirisom ostaje prvi svjedok ove gostoljubivosti čije se vatre nikada ne gase.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic coffee, with its fragrant aroma, remains the primary witness to this hospitality whose fires are never extinguished.
